title: Mpox-Clade-Ib-Clock: Reproducibility code for a pre-registered saturation-aware APOBEC3-clock analysis of mpox clade Ib from the public corpus
description: Reproducibility code and result artefacts for the pre-registered (OSF Pre-Registration CASR2, doi:10.17605/OSF.IO/CASR2) saturation-aware APOBEC3-clock analysis of mpox clade Ib at the 2026-05-22 public-corpus freeze. The repository contains the Python scripts, Snakemake workflow, environment specifications, four §6.4 deviation amendments, the L-BFGS-B random-start convergence trajectory data underlying the headline local-minimum-trap finding, and the five publication figures plus four supplementary tables. See README.md for the data sources, requirements, and reproduction steps.

creators.name: Farquhar, Hayden
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher, Finley, New South Wales, Australia
